{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016244435B6B845F6F5DBAD9CBE"}"},"total":3034},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7570019551327585048","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啧，现在看其他书真看不进去了[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762535904,"group_id":"7503612351933844542","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"11470853127995"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503612351933844542","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"406"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":69052,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7569866051797517080","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，写得很好，就他现阶段写到的春秋战国时期来说，我只知道秦国是奋六世之余烈，但是这六人我却不知道是谁，看作者写的我是真真正正的认识到了每一个人，看到嬴荡的时候，虽然我知道他的命运是举九鼎而死，但我也是发自内心的，不希望他就这样死去，写的很有情感，而且也发现不了什么毒点，虽然名义上的主角周游是爽文小说的经历，但是作者刻画笔墨不多，所以没有那种爽文不带脑，而且任由情绪发散的感觉，反而是由余朝阳等人来重新编撰一个一个故事，去参与历史，去改变历史，去完成历史迷心中所有的遗憾罢了。说了这么多，总结下来就一句话，老登光速更新[重拳出击]","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"春秋战国","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773995084DBAD9CBE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227569866051797517080%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227503612351933844542%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762500274,"group_id":"7503612351933844542","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"目前准备原创一本小说，纯爱可看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2bSFEYC/m27AayUnr1KSg0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c343eafe3a304683b9d0d08005fb7075~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534263&x-signature=1heKudHnOFaCIslrI0A9utix3Hs%3D","user_id":"11470853127995","user_name":"我才不见良爷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"11470853127995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503612351933844542","book_info":{"abstract":"PS：平行世界（大一统帝国，历史不同，兄弟们请放心食用）
大夏帝国，某游戏直播间内。
画面一
“既然游戏制作大赛名单都是垃圾，那就玩最垃圾的那个，出来吧…《三国争霸》！”
“啥玩意？开局桃园三结义，新手任务却是挽大厦之将倾，匡扶汉室？！”
画面二
“这个比三国争霸还离谱，开局一个破碗，新手任务让我日月重开大统天？！”
“游戏作者是人我吃！三国争霸开局好歹还送俩结义兄弟呢！”
画面三
“卧槽！周游老贼大发善心，开局就是大唐帝国太子！”
“等等……我二弟约我明早玄武门相见，还说要给我惊喜？”
“笑话！我都天子了，二弟李世民他能给我什么惊喜？！”
当一个个前世朝代被周游搬进游戏，并被无数玩家通关后，铺天漫骂瞬间化作好评如潮。
有玩家高呼：“玄武门下对掏，谁赢谁太子！”
“香积寺互砍，谁输谁叛军！”
也有玩家痛哭：“丞相保重啊！”
“今晚闪击东吴鼠辈，匡扶汉室！”
更有玩家在接连削藩后，气血上涌：“真男人从不玩继承制，八百就八百！”
当玩家通关历史五千年所有朝代后，周游表示：“信我最后一次，这真是最后一个游戏。”
“游戏名字叫啥？”
“一寸山河一寸血，十万青年十万兵！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7dde0028950b622cd0eee3b9e9fd3113","author":"东方迎","author_id":"","book_id":"7503612351933844542","book_name":"你的游戏为何充满历史感","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503626717135651390","read_count":"124281","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1506850"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"681","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b557a22b706e6e75032727e3a4766cb5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179084&x-signature=IbZN%2Bnn7SKhhLZD7DHkkv6Vc9R8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4018089873119963","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"404"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016244435B6B845F6F5DBAD9CBE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":83,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durati
